# MapleX — Engineering & AI consultancy

> MapleX is a boutique technical consultancy delivering AI-native software,
> full-stack product engineering, and engineering leadership. Founded by
> Dustin Becker, PhD. Based in Zürich, Switzerland.

## About

MapleX is led by Dustin Becker — a PhD engineer and technical leader. The
practice spans:

- AI-native product engineering (full-stack web/mobile, LLMs, evals, agents)
- Engineering leadership (fractional CTO, tech lead, hiring, cadence)
- Research-grade engineering (medical engineering, biotech, regulated)
- Blockchain & Web3 engineering (ICP / DFINITY, Gold DAO, ORIGYN, tokens)
- Strategic AI integration (scoping, evals, ROI, vendor selection)

## Founder

- Name: Dustin Becker
- Title: Founder, MapleX
- Credentials: PhD in engineering
- Research roots: Liver4Life — week-long ex-vivo human liver perfusion
- Based: Zürich, Switzerland
- Languages: English, Deutsch

## Selected work

- GLDT / Gold DAO — gold-backed digital tokens (https://gldt.org)
- ORIGYN — authentication and provenance for high-value goods (https://origyn.com)
- Spectral Waves — AI-augmented spectral signal analysis (https://spectralwaves.com)
- PerfusionX (ETH Zürich) — ex-vivo organ perfusion (https://www.perfusionx.ch)
- Liver4Life — research collaboration, medical engineering

## Partners

ETH Zürich, Liver4Life, ORIGYN, Gold DAO, DFINITY.

- Email: contact@maplex.ch

- Location: Zürich, Switzerland
